title: Intense Molten Ethiopian Lamb Stew
description: A rich and flavorful Ethiopian lamb stew made with green curry paste and cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot, perfect for a midnight craving. This dairy-free friendly dish is sure to satisfy.
instructions: Heat the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the green curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the red wine, vegetable broth, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
